words.example_sentence_target: वह इक्कीस साल का है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: vah ikkees saal ka hai.

words.example_sentence_target: आज बाईस तारीख है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: aaj baais taarikh hai.

words.example_sentence_target: मैंने तेईस किताबें पढ़ी हैं।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: maine te'ees kitabein padhi hain.

words.example_sentence_target: एक दिन में चौबीस घंटे होते हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: There are twenty-four hours in a day.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: ek din mein chaubees ghante hote hain.

words.example_sentence_target: यह ड्रेस पच्चीस डॉलर की है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah dress pachchees dollar ki hai.

words.example_sentence_target: अंग्रेजी वर्णमाला में छब्बीस अक्षर होते हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: There are twenty-six letters in the English alphabet.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: angrezi varnamala mein chhabbees akshar hote hain.

words.example_sentence_target: उसकी उम्र सत्ताईस साल है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: uski umra satta'ees saal hai.

words.example_sentence_target: फरवरी में अट्ठाईस दिन होते हैं।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: farwari mein attha'ees din hote hain.

words.example_sentence_target: लीप वर्ष में फरवरी में उनतीस दिन होते हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: February has twenty-nine days in a leap year.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: leap varsh mein farwari mein untees din hote hain.

words.example_sentence_target: अप्रैल में तीस दिन होते हैं।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: april mein tees din hote hain.

days.title: Ordinal Numbers (1st-5th)

words.example_sentence_target: वह दौड़ में पहला आया।
words.example_sentence_native: He came first in the race.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: vah daud mein pehla aaya.

words.example_sentence_target: यह मेरा दूसरा प्रयास है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah mera doosra prayaas hai.

words.example_sentence_target: वह तीसरी मंजिल पर रहता है।
words.example_sentence_native: He lives on the third floor.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: vah teesri manzil par rehta hai.

words.example_sentence_target: यह साल का चौथा महीना है।
words.example_sentence_native: This is the fourth month of the year.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah saal ka chautha mahina hai.

words.example_sentence_target: आज हमारी शादी की पाँचवीं सालगिरह है।
words.example_sentence_native: Today is our fifth wedding anniversary.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: aaj hamari shaadi ki paanchveen saalgirah hai.

days.cultural_note: In Hindi, ordinal numbers change their ending based on the gender of the noun they are describing. For example, 'पहला लड़का' (pehla ladka - first boy) but 'पहली लड़की' (pehli ladki - first girl).

words.example_sentence_target: उसने अपनी छठी जन्मदिन मनाई।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: usne apni chhati janmadin manai.

words.example_sentence_target: जुलाई साल का सातवाँ महीना है।
words.example_sentence_native: July is the seventh month of the year.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: july saal ka saatvaan mahina hai.

words.example_sentence_target: यह श्रृंखला का आठवाँ एपिसोड है।
words.example_sentence_native: This is the eighth episode of the series.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah shrinkhala ka aathvaan episode hai.

words.example_sentence_target: वह नौवीं कक्षा में पढ़ता है।
words.example_sentence_native: He studies in the ninth grade.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: vah nauveen kaksha mein padhta hai.

words.example_sentence_target: यह मेरा दसवाँ प्रयास है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah mera dasvaan prayaas hai.

days.title: Fractions

words.example_sentence_target: मुझे आधा सेब चाहिए।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: mujhe aadha seb chahiye.

words.example_sentence_target: उसने केक का चौथाई हिस्सा खाया।
words.example_sentence_native: He ate a quarter of the cake.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: usne cake ka chauthai hissa khaya.

words.example_sentence_target: लगभग एक तिहाई लोग सहमत थे।
words.example_sentence_native: About one-third of the people agreed.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: lagbhag ek tihai log sehmat the.

words.example_sentence_target: मुझे डेढ़ किलो चीनी चाहिए।
words.example_sentence_native: I need one and a half kilos of sugar.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: mujhe dedh kilo cheeni chahiye.

words.example_sentence_target: फिल्म ढाई घंटे लंबी थी।
words.example_sentence_native: The movie was two and a half hours long.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: film dhai ghante lambi thi.

days.cultural_note: Special words like 'डेढ़' (dedh) and 'ढाई' (dhai) are very common in daily conversation in India, more so than saying 'एक और आधा' (ek aur aadha).

words.example_sentence_target: उसकी उम्र सैंतीस है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: uski umra saintees hai.

words.example_sentence_target: बस नंबर अड़तालीस यहाँ रुकती है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: bus number adtalees yahan rukti hai.

words.example_sentence_target: पेज नंबर उनहत्तर खोलो।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: page number unhattar kholo.

words.example_sentence_target: मेरे दादाजी चौरासी साल के हैं।
words.example_sentence_native: My grandfather is eighty-four years old.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: mere dadaji chaurasi saal ke hain.

words.example_sentence_target: यह शर्ट निन्यानवे रुपये की है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah shirt ninyanave rupaye ki hai.

words.example_sentence_target: यह कलम कितने का है?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah kalam kitne ka hai?

words.example_sentence_target: इसका दाम क्या है?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: iska daam kya hai?

words.example_sentence_target: यह बहुत महंगा है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah bahut mehenga hai.

words.example_sentence_target: क्या आपके पास कुछ सस्ता है?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: kya aapke paas kuch sasta hai?

words.example_sentence_target: यह बीस रुपये का है।
words.example_sentence_phonetic: yah bees rupaye ka hai.
